description_long: This motorcycle features a retro-futuristic design with a low-slung, elongated frame and large, spoked wheels covered by prominent black fenders. The body is primarily a deep, weathered red with metallic accents, and the seat is wrapped in a textured, brown material that appears padded for comfort. The engine is exposed, showcasing multiple cylinders and metallic pipes, giving it a rugged, mechanical aesthetic. The handlebars are wide and slightly curved, equipped with visible grips and controls, while the headlight is round and centrally mounted at the front. The rear wheel is partially enclosed by a large fender, and the exhaust system runs along the lower side of the frame. Overall, the motorcycle exudes a blend of vintage and industrial styling, suitable for urban environments.
description: A retro-futuristic motorcycle with a weathered red body, large black fenders, exposed engine, and a brown padded seat. It features wide handlebars and a rugged, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, wide handlebars, and the narrow profile of the front wheel and fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated frame, exposed engine, brown padded seat, and large spoked wheels with black fenders.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad rear fender, seat contour, and the symmetry of the handlebars and wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the engine, exhaust pipes, and the detailed structure of the seat and wheels.
